skill-invoke.description: Invoke a skill directly in the agent context

behavioral-trigger.description: Trigger and observe rule/hook behavior via cmux terminal surface

bash.description: Execute scripts/CLI via cmux terminal surface

smoke.description: UI smoke test via Maestro (mobile/web); falls back to Playwright for web-only targets

document-review.description: Human document review — no automated driver

platform_matrix.notes: Project verification-harness.json may override to declare specific platforms (android, ios, web, desktop)

trivial_smoke_escape.notes: Set enabled=true and list change_types to bypass smoke validation for trivial stories of those types
